summary: Frontend E2E for Chat module (iteration 113). Hamburger-btn testid now works (was the previous blocker). Nurse-role drawer correctly HIDES 'Discussion Forum' entry — verified via both testid and text. Implant-In-Charge Abhijit.patil drawer DOES show 'Discussion Forum' (text) and clicking it routes to /forum. However two follow-on issues block the full chat E2E: (1) the segment-chat pill on /forum is NOT being located via [data-testid='segment-chat'] after in-app navigation (page lands on /forum but the pill testid is not discoverable within ~3s), preventing in-app path into /forum/chat. (2) drawer item testids (drawer-forum/drawer-logout/drawer-profile) are not exposed in the DOM — only the label text is clickable. In-app nav via text 'Discussion Forum' works as a fallback. Backend was NOT retested (iter112 covered 22/22 pass). All 3 screens (/forum, /forum/chat, /forum/chat/create, /forum/chat/[groupId]) source code was reviewed and testIDs are declared — the runtime propagation for children of a React Native Modal/FlatList appears to be the gap.

ui_bugs.issue: [data-testid='segment-chat'] is declared in source (line 187) but not locatable in the rendered DOM within 3s after in-app navigation from drawer → 'Discussion Forum'. This blocks the primary E2E path to /forum/chat via the segmented pill. Likely causes: (a) RNW dev bundle timing — page reaches /forum URL but component has not yet mounted the segment pill when the test queries, or (b) data-testid on TouchableOpacity inside a View row does not propagate on web. Please confirm the pill renders immediately (before thread fetch) and that testID propagates.

The drawer items ('Users', 'My Profile', 'Archived Cases', 'Discussion Forum', 'Logout') declare data-testid={`drawer-${key}`} on TouchableOpacity, but these attributes are NOT present in the rendered DOM on web. 'hamburger-btn' DOES work because it is the outermost TouchableOpacity rendered by headerLeft. Drawer items sit inside a Modal → Pressable overlay → Pressable drawer → TouchableOpacity (item), and data-testid appears to be dropped on that nested layer. Text-based selection works as a fallback. Please verify by using testID (camelCase) instead of data-testid (RNW usually mirrors testID → data-testid) OR wrap each menu item with a View that carries data-testid.

integration_issues.issue: Could not complete in-app E2E because segment-chat entry is not observable from Playwright (see UI bug 1). Direct page.goto('/forum/chat') loses the in-memory JWT and redirects to /auth/login, so this path is also not viable on web without persisting JWT to sessionStorage. Recommend the token-mirror fix called out in iteration_112 action items.

action_items: Verify [data-testid='segment-chat'] is present in the DOM on /forum immediately after navigation. Consider adding a small delay or a deterministic marker, or re-render the segment pill unconditionally above the loading state.

Fix propagation of data-testid on DrawerMenu TouchableOpacity items — currently only the text is usable for in-app selection. Easy repro: open drawer on any screen and inspect DOM — 'hamburger-btn' is present, but 'drawer-forum', 'drawer-logout', 'drawer-profile' are not.
Mirror JWT to sessionStorage on web so page.goto('/forum/chat') survives a hard refresh — this is the same recommendation carried over from iteration_112, still un-addressed.
Once the two items above are fixed, re-run the Playwright E2E for T1 (send in All Staff), T2 (create group), T4 (leave non-locked group).
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx L106 sets data-testid on drawer items but the runtime DOM on web does not expose them — investigate why the top-level HeaderLeft testid propagates but the nested-in-Modal ones do not.
/app/frontend/app/forum/index.tsx segment pill at L180-192 is rendered before threads load so it should be instantly available; but the test could not locate it. May be a FlatList parent issue.
iteration_112 called out JWT-in-memory-on-web as a quirk — still not addressed, and it prevents direct deep-linking to chat screens which is a standard testing workflow.

success_rate.frontend: partial — hamburger-btn works ✓, nurse-drawer hides Discussion Forum ✓, Abhijit drawer shows Discussion Forum ✓, /forum reachable ✓; segment-chat→/forum/chat→All Staff→send flow BLOCKED; create-group & leave-group NOT EXERCISED

test_credentials: Used Abhijit.patil/Admin@123 (implant_incharge) and nurse.1@dental.edu/Nurse@123 from review request + /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: None this iteration (create-group flow could not reach submission).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login: placeholder is 'Login ID (e.g. Name.surname@dental.edu)' — use input[placeholder^='Login ID'] or query_selector_all('input') and index [0]/[1]. Hamburger-btn works and opens a Modal drawer. Drawer items have declared data-testid but they are NOT in the rendered DOM — use text selectors ('Discussion Forum', 'Logout') as fallback. Nurse lands on /onboarding after first login — press Skip/Next to reach dashboard. segment-chat testid on /forum could not be found within 3s — may need longer wait or the testID propagation inside the component needs a fix. Backend chat endpoints are green per iteration_112.
rca_of_the_issue: Two RNW-specific gaps blocked the UI E2E: (1) data-testid not propagating through nested RN components (drawer items inside a Modal, segment pill inside a View row) — this is a known RNW behaviour when testID is not used or is replaced by data-testid spread. The hamburger-btn works because the testID prop is set alongside data-testid and accessibilityLabel, and RNW handles that combination. (2) JWT is only in-memory on web, so the only practical E2E entry is in-app navigation from the drawer — which itself has the testid gap. Net effect: the critical path (drawer → forum → segment-chat → chat room) is only partially automatable today. Fixing item (1) on segment-chat alone unblocks the main flow.
